Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT VICTORIA CARD'S Motion For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Orders Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Sacntions Thereon is taken off calendar without prejudice to refile motion. No courtesy copies of moving papers provided to the Court per Local Rule 2.6B. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion For Order For Deemed Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Philip Kilduff telephone number 415-673-0368 for Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Court rules as follows:

1) PLAINTIFF HDM FURNITURE INDUSTRIES INC.'S Motion For Order For Deemed Admissions And For Sanctions is granted. Order signed.

2) PLAINTIFF HDM FURNITURE INDUSTRIES INC.'S Motion For Order Compelling Response To Interrogatories And For Sanctions Thereon is granted. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Gray. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
